Rt Hon Dr Andrew Murrison MP
South West Wiltshire

Advice Surgeries

  • Tweet

Andrew holds regular advice surgeries in South West Wiltshire, including sessions at his constituency office and within the constituency.  These are for residents to raise issues and express concerns.  

To book an appointment please call Andrew's office on 01225 358584.

Alternatively, you can write to Andrew at:  House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA or email: [email protected]
